response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent asserts), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop facilitation, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or mobile platform experience — key requirements for this Engineering Productivity Manager role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack spanning mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and high-performance infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks documented experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as required
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment responsibilities
